'''竏嗅-th-t-y''' ('''kakathteyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbox|imbox]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-t-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbox|imbox]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗅-th-t-y
|-
! Lemma
| kakathteyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikathteyoko|thikathteyoko]] || [[word:jikathteyoko|jikathteyoko]] || [[word:shikathteyoko|shikathteyoko]] || [[word:kikathteyoko|kikathteyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukathteyoko|thuthukathteyoko]] || [[word:jujukathteyoko|jujukathteyoko]] || [[word:shushukathteyoko|shushukathteyoko]] || [[word:kukukathteyoko|kukukathteyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukathteyoko|thukathteyoko]] || [[word:jukathteyoko|jukathteyoko]] || [[word:shukathteyoko|shukathteyoko]] || [[word:kukathteyoko|kukathteyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukathteyoko|thukathteyoko]] || [[word:jukathteyoko|jukathteyoko]] || [[word:shukathteyoko|shukathteyoko]] || [[word:kukathteyoko|kukathteyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekathteyoko|thekathteyoko]] || [[word:jekathteyoko|jekathteyoko]] || [[word:shekathteyoko|shekathteyoko]] || [[word:kekathteyoko|kekathteyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokathteyoko|thothokathteyoko]] || [[word:jojokathteyoko|jojokathteyoko]] || [[word:shoshokathteyoko|shoshokathteyoko]] || [[word:kokokathteyoko|kokokathteyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokathteyoko|thokathteyoko]] || [[word:jokathteyoko|jokathteyoko]] || [[word:shokathteyoko|shokathteyoko]] || [[word:kokathteyoko|kokathteyoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokathteyoko|thokathteyoko]] || [[word:jokathteyoko|jokathteyoko]] || [[word:shokathteyoko|shokathteyoko]] || [[word:kokathteyoko|kokathteyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦkathteyoko|thﾃｦkathteyoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦkathteyoko|jﾃｦkathteyoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦkathteyoko|shﾃｦkathteyoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦkathteyoko|kﾃｦkathteyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakathteyoko|thathakathteyoko]] || [[word:jajakathteyoko|jajakathteyoko]] || [[word:shashakathteyoko|shashakathteyoko]] || [[word:kakakathteyoko|kakakathteyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakathteyoko|thakathteyoko]] || [[word:jakathteyoko|jakathteyoko]] || [[word:shakathteyoko|shakathteyoko]] || [[word:kakathteyoko|kakathteyoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakathteyoko|thakathteyoko]] || [[word:jakathteyoko|jakathteyoko]] || [[word:shakathteyoko|shakathteyoko]] || [[word:kakathteyoko|kakathteyoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shakathteyithi|shakathteyithi]] || [[word:shakathteyiji|shakathteyiji]] || [[word:shakathteyishi|shakathteyishi]] || [[word:shakathteyiki|shakathteyiki]]

|}
